message:
feat(ci): drive Lean full gate from artifact contract in CI profiles JSON

Refactor the Lean full CI job to resolve all artifact paths, triage
routing, and retention policy from the ci_verification_profiles.json
artifact_contract rather than hardcoding them in the workflow YAML.

New "Resolve Lean full artifact contract" step:
- Reads artifact_contract.manifest_schema_version from the profiles
- Reads per-profile artifact_bundle (name, directory, retention_days,
  repro_bundle_manifest, repro_script, failure_payload) and triage
  (routing_policy, ttfr_target_minutes) from the full profile
- Validates all required fields are present and numeric where expected
- Exports all values as step outputs for downstream steps

Refactored downstream steps:
- "Run Lean full profile commands" uses contract-driven artifact_dir
  instead of hardcoded lean-full/
- Repro bundle manifest includes toolchain metadata (rustc, cargo,
  rustup_toolchain), inputs section (profile_file, commands_file,
  cargo_lock_sha256), and manifest_required_fields from the contract
- "Emit full failure payload" reads all paths and routing config
  from step outputs instead of hardcoded values
- "Upload Lean full artifacts" uses contract-driven name, path,
  and retention-days via step output interpolation

This ensures the CI workflow stays synchronized with the profiles
JSON and any changes to artifact naming, retention, or triage routing
only need to be made in one place.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -233,39 +233,97 @@ jobs:
             target
           key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-lean-full-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
 
-      - name: Run Lean full profile commands
+      - name: Resolve Lean full artifact contract
+        id: lean_full_contract
         shell: bash
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
-          mkdir -p lean-full
 
           profile_file="formal/lean/coverage/ci_verification_profiles.json"
           if [[ ! -f "$profile_file" ]]; then
             echo "::error::Missing $profile_file"
             exit 1
           fi
 
+          profile_json="$(jq -c '.profiles[] | select(.name == "full")' "$profile_file")"
+          if [[ -z "$profile_json" || "$profile_json" == "null" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Missing full profile in $profile_file"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          manifest_schema_version="$(jq -r '.artifact_contract.manifest_schema_version // empty' "$profile_file")"
+          artifact_name="$(jq -r '.artifact_bundle.name // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
+          artifact_dir="$(jq -r '.artifact_bundle.directory // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
+          retention_days="$(jq -r '.artifact_bundle.retention_days // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
+          routing_policy="$(jq -r '.triage.routing_policy // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
+          ttfr_target_minutes="$(jq -r '.triage.ttfr_target_minutes // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
+          repro_bundle_manifest="$(jq -r '.artifact_bundle.repro_bundle_manifest // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
+          repro_script="$(jq -r '.artifact_bundle.repro_script // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
+          failure_payload_path="$(jq -r '.artifact_bundle.failure_payload // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
+
+          if [[ -z "$manifest_schema_version" || -z "$artifact_name" || -z "$artifact_dir" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Full artifact contract is missing manifest schema/name/directory"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          if [[ -z "$repro_bundle_manifest" || -z "$repro_script" || -z "$failure_payload_path" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Full artifact contract is missing repro/failure payload paths"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          if [[ ! "$retention_days" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Full retention_days must be numeric, got: $retention_days"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          if [[ ! "$ttfr_target_minutes" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Full ttfr_target_minutes must be numeric, got: $ttfr_target_minutes"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          if [[ -z "$routing_policy" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Full triage.routing_policy must be non-empty"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          {
+            printf 'profile_file=%s\n' "$profile_file"
+            printf 'manifest_schema_version=%s\n' "$manifest_schema_version"
+            printf 'artifact_name=%s\n' "$artifact_name"
+            printf 'artifact_dir=%s\n' "$artifact_dir"
+            printf 'retention_days=%s\n' "$retention_days"
+            printf 'routing_policy=%s\n' "$routing_policy"
+            printf 'ttfr_target_minutes=%s\n' "$ttfr_target_minutes"
+            printf 'repro_bundle_manifest=%s\n' "$repro_bundle_manifest"
+            printf 'repro_script=%s\n' "$repro_script"
+            printf 'failure_payload=%s\n' "$failure_payload_path"
+          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+
+      - name: Run Lean full profile commands
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          artifact_dir="${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.artifact_dir }}"
+          profile_file="${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.profile_file }}"
+          mkdir -p "$artifact_dir"
+
           mapfile -t full_commands < <(jq -r '.profiles[] | select(.name == "full") | .commands[]' "$profile_file")
           if [[ "${#full_commands[@]}" -eq 0 ]]; then
             echo "::error::Full profile has no commands"
             exit 1
           fi
 
-          printf '%s\n' "${full_commands[@]}" > lean-full/commands.txt
+          printf '%s\n' "${full_commands[@]}" > "$artifact_dir/commands.txt"
 
           run_status="success"
-          : > lean-full/run.log
+          : > "$artifact_dir/run.log"
 
           for cmd in "${full_commands[@]}"; do
-            echo ">>> $cmd" | tee -a lean-full/run.log
-            if ! bash -lc "$cmd" >> lean-full/run.log 2>&1; then
-              printf '%s\n' "$cmd" > lean-full/failed_command.txt
+            echo ">>> $cmd" | tee -a "$artifact_dir/run.log"
+            if ! bash -lc "$cmd" >> "$artifact_dir/run.log" 2>&1; then
+              printf '%s\n' "$cmd" > "$artifact_dir/failed_command.txt"
               run_status="failure"
               break
             fi
           done
 
-          printf '%s\n' "$run_status" > lean-full/status.txt
+          printf '%s\n' "$run_status" > "$artifact_dir/status.txt"
           if [[ "$run_status" != "success" ]]; then
             exit 1
           fi
@@ -275,14 +333,22 @@ jobs:
         shell: bash
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
-          mkdir -p lean-full
-
-          profile_file="formal/lean/coverage/ci_verification_profiles.json"
-          failed_cmd="$(cat lean-full/failed_command.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
-          run_status="$(cat lean-full/status.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
+          artifact_dir="${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.artifact_dir }}"
+          profile_file="${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.profile_file }}"
+          manifest_schema_version="${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.manifest_schema_version }}"
+          repro_bundle_manifest="${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.repro_bundle_manifest }}"
+          repro_script="${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.repro_script }}"
+          mkdir -p "$artifact_dir"
+
+          failed_cmd="$(cat "$artifact_dir/failed_command.txt" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
+          run_status="$(cat "$artifact_dir/status.txt" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
+          rustc_version="$(rustc -V)"
+          cargo_version="$(cargo -V)"
+          rustup_toolchain="${RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN:-unknown}"
+          cargo_lock_sha256="$(sha256sum Cargo.lock | awk '{print $1}')"
 
           mapfile -t full_artifacts < <(jq -r '.profiles[] | select(.name == "full") | .output_artifacts[]' "$profile_file")
-          : > lean-full/artifacts.jsonl
+          : > "$artifact_dir/artifacts.jsonl"
           for artifact in "${full_artifacts[@]}"; do
             if [[ -f "$artifact" ]]; then
               sha256="$(sha256sum "$artifact" | awk '{print $1}')"
@@ -292,46 +358,52 @@ jobs:
                 --arg sha256 "$sha256" \
                 --argjson size_bytes "$size_bytes" \
                 '{path: $path, exists: true, sha256: $sha256, size_bytes: $size_bytes}' \
-                >> lean-full/artifacts.jsonl
+                >> "$artifact_dir/artifacts.jsonl"
             else
               jq -cn \
                 --arg path "$artifact" \
                 '{path: $path, exists: false, sha256: null, size_bytes: null}' \
-                >> lean-full/artifacts.jsonl
+                >> "$artifact_dir/artifacts.jsonl"
             fi
           done
 
-          jq -s '.' lean-full/artifacts.jsonl > lean-full/artifacts.json
+          jq -s '.' "$artifact_dir/artifacts.jsonl" > "$artifact_dir/artifacts.json"
 
           {
             echo "#!/usr/bin/env bash"
             echo "set -euo pipefail"
             while IFS= read -r cmd; do
               [[ -n \"$cmd\" ]] || continue
               printf '%s\n' \"$cmd\"
-            done < lean-full/commands.txt
-          } > lean-full/repro_commands.sh
-          chmod +x lean-full/repro_commands.sh
+            done < "$artifact_dir/commands.txt"
+          } > "$repro_script"
+          chmod +x "$repro_script"
 
           jq -n \
-            --arg schema_version "lean.full.repro.bundle.v1" \
+            --arg schema_version "$manifest_schema_version" \
             --arg generated_at_utc "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" \
             --arg profile "full" \
             --arg status "$run_status" \
             --arg failed_command "$failed_cmd" \
             --arg profile_source "$profile_file" \
-            --arg repro_script "lean-full/repro_commands.sh" \
+            --arg repro_script "$repro_script" \
+            --arg commands_file "$artifact_dir/commands.txt" \
             --arg workflow_name "${GITHUB_WORKFLOW}" \
             --arg run_id "${GITHUB_RUN_ID}" \
             --arg run_attempt "${GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT}" \
             --arg event_name "${GITHUB_EVENT_NAME}" \
             --arg git_ref "${GITHUB_REF}" \
             --arg git_commit "${GITHUB_SHA}" \
+            --arg rustc_version "$rustc_version" \
+            --arg cargo_version "$cargo_version" \
+            --arg rustup_toolchain "$rustup_toolchain" \
+            --arg cargo_lock_sha256 "$cargo_lock_sha256" \
             --arg ownership_json "$(jq -c '.profiles[] | select(.name == "full") | .ownership' "$profile_file")" \
             --arg comparison_keys_json "$(jq -c '.profiles[] | select(.name == "full") | .comparison_keys' "$profile_file")" \
             --argjson expected_runtime_seconds "$(jq '.profiles[] | select(.name == "full") | .expected_runtime_seconds' "$profile_file")" \
-            --argjson commands "$(jq -Rsc 'split(\"\\n\")[:-1]' lean-full/commands.txt)" \
-            --argjson artifacts "$(cat lean-full/artifacts.json)" \
+            --argjson commands "$(jq -Rsc 'split(\"\\n\")[:-1]' "$artifact_dir/commands.txt")" \
+            --argjson artifacts "$(cat "$artifact_dir/artifacts.json")" \
+            --argjson manifest_required_fields "$(jq '.artifact_contract.manifest_required_fields' "$profile_file")" \
             '{
               schema_version: $schema_version,
               generated_at_utc: $generated_at_utc,
@@ -351,28 +423,45 @@ jobs:
               ownership: ($ownership_json | fromjson),
               comparison_keys: ($comparison_keys_json | fromjson),
               expected_runtime_seconds: $expected_runtime_seconds,
+              toolchain: {
+                rustc: $rustc_version,
+                cargo: $cargo_version,
+                rustup_toolchain: $rustup_toolchain
+              },
+              inputs: {
+                profile_file: $profile_source,
+                commands_file: $commands_file,
+                cargo_lock_sha256: $cargo_lock_sha256
+              },
+              manifest_required_fields: $manifest_required_fields,
               commands: $commands,
               artifacts: $artifacts
-            }' > lean-full/repro_bundle_manifest.json
+            }' > "$repro_bundle_manifest"
 
       - name: Emit full failure payload
         if: failure()
         shell: bash
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
-          mkdir -p lean-full
+          artifact_dir="${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.artifact_dir }}"
+          profile_file="${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.profile_file }}"
+          routing_policy="${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.routing_policy }}"
+          ttfr_target_minutes="${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.ttfr_target_minutes }}"
+          repro_bundle_manifest="${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.repro_bundle_manifest }}"
+          repro_script="${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.repro_script }}"
+          failure_payload_path="${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.failure_payload }}"
+          mkdir -p "$artifact_dir"
 
-          profile_file="formal/lean/coverage/ci_verification_profiles.json"
-          failed_cmd="$(cat lean-full/failed_command.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
+          failed_cmd="$(cat "$artifact_dir/failed_command.txt" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
 
           jq -n \
             --arg profile "full" \
             --arg failed_command "$failed_cmd" \
-            --arg repro_bundle_manifest "lean-full/repro_bundle_manifest.json" \
-            --arg repro_script "lean-full/repro_commands.sh" \
-            --arg routing_policy "bead-owner-v1" \
+            --arg repro_bundle_manifest "$repro_bundle_manifest" \
+            --arg repro_script "$repro_script" \
+            --arg routing_policy "$routing_policy" \
             --arg ownership_json "$(jq -c '.profiles[] | select(.name == "full") | .ownership' "$profile_file")" \
-            --argjson ttfr_target_minutes 60 \
+            --argjson ttfr_target_minutes "$ttfr_target_minutes" \
             '{
               profile: $profile,
               routing_policy: $routing_policy,
@@ -387,24 +476,24 @@ jobs:
                 "Route to ownership.primary_bead and failure_triage_bead with manifest + failed command",
                 "Escalate to ownership.escalation_bead if TTFR exceeds ttfr_target_minutes"
               ]
-            }' > lean-full/failure_payload.json
+            }' > "$failure_payload_path"
 
           {
             echo "## Lean Full Failure Payload"
             echo
             echo "- Failed command: \`$failed_cmd\`"
-            echo "- Repro bundle: \`lean-full/repro_bundle_manifest.json\`"
-            echo "- Repro script: \`lean-full/repro_commands.sh\`"
-            echo "- Failure payload: \`lean-full/failure_payload.json\`"
+            echo "- Repro bundle: \`$repro_bundle_manifest\`"
+            echo "- Repro script: \`$repro_script\`"
+            echo "- Failure payload: \`$failure_payload_path\`"
           } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
 
       - name: Upload Lean full artifacts
         if: always()
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
-          name: lean-full-artifacts
-          path: lean-full/
-          retention-days: 30
+          name: ${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.artifact_name }}
+          path: ${{ steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.artifact_dir }}/
+          retention-days: ${{ fromJSON(steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.retention_days) }}
 
   test:
     name: Test Suite
